languages.text: "Это будет стоить немало... но расчищенные территории будут полезны в будущем. Прекрасное решение, Лорд-капитан!"
"It will cost a great deal... but the cleared territory will be useful in the future. An excellent decision, Lord Captain!"
languages.original_text: "Это будет стоить немало... но расчищенные территории будут полезны в будущем. Прекрасное решение, Лорд-капитан!"

traits.locale_text: "It will cost a great deal... but the cleared territory will be useful in the future. An excellent decision, Lord Captain!"
"It will cost a great deal... but the cleared territory will be useful in the future. An excellent decision, Lord Captain!"
"It will cost a great deal... but the cleared territory will be useful in the future. An excellent decision, Lord Captain!"

languages.text: 「費用はかかりますが、開拓した土地は将来役に立つでしょう。素晴らしい決断、艦長様！」
languages.original_text: "It will cost a great deal... but the cleared territory will be useful in the future. An excellent decision, Lord Captain!"

traits.locale_text: 「費用はかかりますが、開拓した土地は将来役に立つでしょう。素晴らしい決断、艦長様！」

languages.text: «Nos saldrá caro... pero el territorio despejado será útil más adelante. ¡Una decisión excelente, Lord Capitán!».
languages.original_text: "It will cost a great deal... but the cleared territory will be useful in the future. An excellent decision, Lord Captain!"

traits.locale_text: «Nos saldrá caro... pero el territorio despejado será útil más adelante. ¡Una decisión excelente, Lord Capitán!».

languages.text: “代价将极其高昂……但净化后的领土必将带来长远收益。明智的决断，舰长大人！”
languages.original_text: "It will cost a great deal... but the cleared territory will be useful in the future. An excellent decision, Lord Captain!"

traits.locale_text: “代价将极其高昂……但净化后的领土必将带来长远收益。明智的决断，舰长大人！”

languages.text: "Der Preis dafür wird hoch sein, aber ... das geräumte Territorium wird uns gute Dienste leisten. Eine ausgezeichnete Entscheidung, Lord Captain!"
languages.original_text: "It will cost a great deal... but the cleared territory will be useful in the future. An excellent decision, Lord Captain!"

traits.locale_text: "Der Preis dafür wird hoch sein, aber ... das geräumte Territorium wird uns gute Dienste leisten. Eine ausgezeichnete Entscheidung, Lord Captain!"

languages.text: "Bedeli çok ağır olacak... Fakat temizlenen bölge, gelecekte faydalı olacaktır. Mükemmel bir karar Lord Kaptan!"
languages.original_text: "It will cost a great deal... but the cleared territory will be useful in the future. An excellent decision, Lord Captain!"

traits.locale_text: "Bedeli çok ağır olacak... Fakat temizlenen bölge, gelecekte faydalı olacaktır. Mükemmel bir karar Lord Kaptan!"

languages.text: « Le prix à payer sera élevé... mais le territoire nettoyé nous sera utile à l'avenir. C'est une excellente décision, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine} ! »
languages.original_text: "It will cost a great deal... but the cleared territory will be useful in the future. An excellent decision, Lord Captain!"
